function D(D)return u[D-(398155-353173)]end for D,W in ipairs({{-326796-(-326797),1047354-1046423};{501317-501316,230663+-230090};{51091+-50517;-84085-(-85016)}})do while W[730563+-730562]<W[79222-79220]do
